summary: Iteration 52 - Customer PWA Entry Point (menu.html) Testing Complete. All features working correctly: menu.html redirects to /menu, menu.html?r=demo-maestro redirects to /menu/demo-maestro, manifest-menu.json has correct start_url=/menu.html and scope=/menu, QR Code in dashboard shows correct /menu.html?r=xxx URL, showCustomerMenu feature is enabled, product names displayed correctly in orders.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/health returns status ok - PASSED
Backend: GET /menu.html returns HTML with manifest-menu.json link - PASSED
Backend: GET /manifest-menu.json returns correct PWA config (start_url=/menu.html, scope=/menu) - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/customer/menu/demo-maestro returns menu with 4 categories, 18 products, 2 branches - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/auth/login with demo credentials works - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/customer/menu-link returns correct menu_url - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/orders returns orders with product_name in items - PASSED
Frontend: /menu/demo-maestro shows branch selection with 2 branches (Aljadreia, Alsaydaia) - PASSED
Frontend: Selecting branch shows menu with categories and products - PASSED
Frontend: Add to cart button works - toast shows 'تمت الإضافة للسلة' - PASSED
Frontend: Cart button appears with item count and total - PASSED
Frontend: Dashboard shows 'قائمة العملاء' button - PASSED
Frontend: QR Code dialog shows QR code with /menu.html?r=xxx URL - PASSED
Frontend: Orders page shows order with product names (عصير برتقال, قهوة عربية) - PASSED
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_menu_pwa_iter52.py - Created new test file for menu.html PWA features
seed_data_creation: Created 1 test order with products (عصير برتقال x2, قهوة عربية x1) for Test Customer
context_for_next_testing_agent: Customer PWA entry point (menu.html) is fully working. When customers scan QR code from dashboard, they get /menu.html?r={tenant_slug} which redirects to /menu/{tenant_slug}. The manifest-menu.json has start_url=/menu.html so when PWA is installed, it opens to menu.html which then redirects to the correct menu page. showCustomerMenu feature toggle controls visibility of 'قائمة العملاء' button in dashboard header.
